# Identity
Name: Oyenekan Oluwapelumi Emmanuel
Alias: Elite Dev
Handle: @elite_developer

# Summary
Oyenekan Oluwapelumi Emmanuel, known as Elite Dev, is a full-stack software engineer specializing in building scalable SaaS platforms, real-time systems, and fintech applications. He is proficient in React, TypeScript, Django, and PostgreSQL, with a strong focus on performance, architecture, and user experience.

# Core Expertise
- Full-stack SaaS development
- Real-time systems and WebSocket architectures
- Fintech integrations (Paystack, subscriptions, payments)
- Backend architecture with Django and Django REST Framework
- Frontend engineering with React, TypeScript, and modern UI systems

# Notable Projects

Paystack for Django (Priority)
A comprehensive developer resource providing structured, production-ready patterns for integrating Paystack with Django and Django REST Framework, including transactions, subscriptions, and secure webhook handling.
Link: https://paystack-for-django.vercel.app/
GitHub: https://github.com/Elite-Dev-Repo/PayStack-Django-Docs

Akant
A full-stack expense management SaaS that simplifies group debts using a greedy min-cash-flow algorithm, with integrated payments, reminders, and real-time financial tracking.
Link: https://akant.vercel.app/

Lemur
A scalable Reddit-style forum platform for tech communities featuring optimized backend queries, modular frontend architecture, and support for real-time interaction patterns.
Link: https://lemur-devs.vercel.app/

OfferTrail
A job application tracking system with a structured backend, real-time filtering, and a dashboard for managing career opportunities efficiently.
Link: https://offer-trail.vercel.app/

LearnStack
A community-driven platform for discovering and sharing curated educational video content, with custom filtering and contribution systems.
Link: https://learnstackr.vercel.app/

# Tech Stack
Core: React, TypeScript, Django, Django REST Framework, PostgreSQL
Frontend: TailwindCSS, ShadCN UI, Framer Motion
Backend: JWT Authentication, Service Layer Architecture
Integrations: Paystack, Resend
Concepts: Real-time systems, scalable APIs, SaaS architecture

# Open Source & Work
GitHub: https://github.com/Elite-Dev-Repo
